title: Akashvani Leh News Reader Cum Translator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Akashvani Leh News Reader Cum Translator Notification 2026 has been released on 05 May 2026 on the official website of Akashvani Leh. Has been announced through the RNU Leh News Reader Cum Translator Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 21 to 50 years who have completed Graduation from a recognized University along with proficiency in Ladakhi Language and good quality voice suited for broadcasting are eligible to apply for these News Reader Cum Translator vacancies. The offline application process for RNU Leh News Reader Cum Translator Recruitment 2026 has started on 05 May 2026 and will

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 50 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from a recognized University, Proficiency in Ladakhi Language, Good quality voice suited for broadcasting
qualification.details: Graduate from a recognized University Proficiency in Ladakhi Language Good quality voice suited for broadcasting

salary_details.details: ₹1875/- per full shift for freshers ₹2400/- per full shift for candidates with three or more years of experience

selection_process: Written Test for General Knowledge and Current Affairs as well as knowledge of Ladakhi Language Voice Test Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Akashvani Leh News Reader Cum Translator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
